variants.name: 鼠王
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。与你首次杀死的玩家邻近的镇民玩家中毒。
variants.otherNightReminder: The Rat King chooses a player, that player dies -- Mark them with the "dead" reminder token. If this is the first player who's died due to the Rat King ability, their Townsfolk neighbors are poisoned -- Mark them with the "poisoned" reminder tokens.
variants.flavor: It started with one exiled man, yes that is true. But one man presumed dead quickly turned into two. And once there was three then it became a crowd. Who rued the fourth man, for he screamed so loud. The fifth man was lonely, had the crowd worried sick. So all the soiled men cheered when they threw down the sixth. Crushing the seventh man's head, the eighth man cried. "More bodies in the pit!" as they tossed in number nine.
